---
title: "12. 聚散与流通"
subtitle: "Gathering, Dispersal, and Information Flow"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 12
categories: [i-ching, cultural, omega]
description: "How gathering, dispersal, blockage, source depth, penetration, and open exchange map flow onto information channels, compression, and hierarchical transmission."
---

**Hexagrams:** 比(8), 坎(29), 姤(44), 萃(45), 困(47), 井(48), 巽(57), 兑(58), 涣(59)  
**Omega Directions:** `rate-distortion`, `fold operator`, `modular tower inverse limit`

{{< include articles/category_12_gathering_dispersal_information_flow.md >}}

---

[Back to I Ching Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)

## Video & Media

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_12_gathering_dispersal_information_flow_video.mp4 >}}

**Downloads:**

- [Slides (PDF)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_12_gathering_dispersal_information_flow_slides.pdf)
- [Video (MP4)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_12_gathering_dispersal_information_flow_video.mp4)
- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_12_gathering_dispersal_information_flow_infographic.png)
